purpose: Record focused ACT/NT source rechecks after Queensland and NSW manual records were committed. This file is not a calendar input.

checked_terms: Canberra Racing Club race dates June 2026
source_rechecks.result: Canberra Acton rows for 2026-06-12 and 2026-06-26 are already included in the committed Racing NSW manual file from Racing NSW Race Diary / Race Dates sources. A separate ACT official full-month source was not captured, so no separate ACT manual file was created to avoid duplicate or inferred records.

source_rechecks.result: Search and route checks did not capture a complete official June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse month table for Northern Territory. News/event snippets and carnival context are insufficient for PR-130 full-month calendar records, so no NT manual file was created.

promotion_status.reason: ACT would duplicate Racing NSW captured Canberra Acton rows without a separate official full-month ACT source. NT has no captured official full-month source.

next_steps: If a Canberra Racing Club / Thoroughbred Park official race-date export is found, decide whether to split ACT rows out of Racing NSW or keep them in the NSW/ACT source group without duplication.
Search for official Thoroughbred Racing Northern Territory, Darwin Turf Club, or Alice Springs Turf Club race-date exports for June 2026.
Avoid promoting news snippets, event marketing pages, or Racing Australia visible-window rows as full-month records.
